description_long: This modern bungalow features a large, angular roof with a central chimney and a mix of flat and sloped surfaces. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, complemented by extensive glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The property includes a detached garage, a driveway, a swimming pool, and a landscaped garden with trees, hedges, and a small patio area. A glass-enclosed sunroom and a circular outdoor structure are visible on one side, adding architectural interest. The grounds are bordered by manicured hedges, and the backyard offers additional seating and recreational space. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, light-colored bungalow with a large angular roof, extensive windows, a detached garage, pool, and landscaped garden. Features include a sunroom, patio, and circular outdoor structure, all surrounded by manicured hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and pool, with symmetrical landscaping and a prominent central chimney.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass-enclosed sunroom, circular outdoor structure, and lush backyard greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, backyard lawn, and patio area, with the pool and sunroom partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the garage entrance, driveway, and additional garden elements, with the sunroom and circular structure visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
